message:
feat(engine): add RGC contract binary entrypoints

Three new binary targets for running release gate contracts standalone:

- franken_persistent_cache_contract: Exercises the persistent cache
  contract end-to-end outside the test harness
- franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract: Validates seqlock reader/writer
  contract invariants as a standalone binary
- franken_seqlock_rollout_guard: Runs the seqlock rollout guard safety
  case checks independently

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
